_collision_note: EXACT mesh collision (water-tower technique): render_mesh writes a PhysicsMeshFile nested inside PhysicsShapeList in road_cover_northwest_barrier.vmdl, so the whole barrier is solid cover. road_cover_northwest_barrier.prefab carries a ModelCollider (Model=road_cover_northwest_barrier.vmdl, Static=true) on the Visual child so collision rides the exact visual transform. See docs/collision_authoring.md.
